results.title: Gleap Reviews (2026) - Product Hunt
results.content:
Keyword Insights AI Writer Assistant

•1 review

I've switched from Intercom to Gleap and it's been a fantastic experience. The features are top-notch, and the support team is always ready to assist. The co-founder's honesty and openness to feedback are admirable. The pricing is affordable and provides excellent value, especially compared to similar tools like Intercom. A few areas could use improvement, such as the support documentation and the somewhat complicated user authentication during implementation. But considering the tool's novelty, these are understandable growing pains. Overall, this tool is a promising addition to the market.

#### What's great

affordable pricing (1)

#### What needs improvement

complicated user authentication (1)support documentation (1)

one of the worse train knowledge feature, I tried like almost 10 chatbot apps. for interface feature it's good. but my concern it's more on how chatbot can deliver precise information without hallucinate. I have massive information need to deliver but it can't, even it can't trained to on their knowledge feature. and slow customer service. just formal reach out through email.

#### What needs improvement

poor train knowledge feature (1)slow customer service (1)

Report

•1 review [...] customizable GPT models (2)

Report

 9 views

•1 review

We used this system as a pilot. This is the best AI Chatbot for customer support, which has been a refreshing change from others (more expensive) on the market. The functionality and integration with external tools is impressive, but usability is where this product shines. I found that the usability, combined with the reactive customer support, enabled me to build-out a pilot quickly and confidently.

#### What's great

easy integration (1)excellent customer support (8)

Maurice Kleine [...] •2 reviews

#### What's great

Super useful tool if you use Claude daily.  
It shows token usage clearly in real time, so you always know how much you are spending.

No setup pain, just install and it works.

The UI is clean, lightweight, and does exactly one job really well.

Saved me from overusing tokens multiple times.

Highly recommended for anyone serious about Claude.

#### What needs improvement

add more AI models like cursor, antigravity, codexthat would be awesome.
